column1: # OWASP ZAP rule overrides for the email-hub baseline scan.
# Reduce noise from rules whose findings are tracked separately or which
# are explicitly out of scope per .agents/plans/audit-implementation.md.
# CSP unsafe-inline / unsafe-eval — out of scope per audit plan; removal
# requires nonces/hashes across every inline style and script (multi-week
# effort). Tracked as a separate plan.

column3: CSP unsafe-inline acknowledged; covered by separate plan

column1: # X-Content-Type-Options — already set in next.config.ts; ZAP can mis-detect
# when it scans static assets that bypass the Next.js middleware. Demote
# to warn so we surface real misses without blocking CI on noise.

column3: Header is set in next.config.ts; ZAP may miss it on static assets

column1: # Cookie without SameSite — FastAPI session cookies set SameSite=Lax via
# starlette default, but ZAP sometimes misreads. Warn rather than fail.

column3: SameSite is set by Starlette defaults; verify per-cookie if flagged
